name: MetaMCP Bridge
description: Bridges MetaMCP tool aggregation into Lucia agents via the MetaMCP proxy. Automatically seeds MCP tool server definitions from your MetaMCP instance.
author: Lucia Team

name: Brave Search
description: Privacy-respecting web search skill using the Brave Search API. Registers IWebSearchSkill so the GeneralAgent gains a web_search tool.
author: Lucia Team

name: SearXNG Web Search
description: Privacy-respecting web search skill using a SearXNG instance. Registers IWebSearchSkill so the GeneralAgent gains a web_search tool.
author: Lucia Team
